title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.11.24 - New Undoom power: the inverse of Doom (heals up to X at the end of the enemy turn); Doom & Undoom are now an invertible/swappable pair. The Second Lesson now draws from ALL invertible pairs (adds Vigor, Tainted/Untainted, Tension/Untension, Doom/Undoom), via a single unified pair registry. Adds Tension/Untension/Undoom/Untainted icons.
